# FindAManagerAL

> Free matching service connecting foreign property owners with trusted local property managers in Portugal.

FindAManagerAL helps foreign nationals who own holiday properties in Portugal find vetted, experienced local property managers. The service is free and covers the Algarve, Lisbon, and Porto regions.

## Service

- [Home](https://findamanageral.com/)
- [Algarve](https://findamanageral.com/algarve)
- [Lisbon](https://findamanageral.com/lisbon)
- [Porto](https://findamanageral.com/porto)

## About

FindAManagerAL is a lead generation platform targeting foreign property owners in Portugal who need remote property management for short-term rentals (Alojamento Local). The platform matches owners with local managers who handle guest communications, check-in/out, cleaning, maintenance, and Portuguese tax compliance.

Target audience: UK, Irish, Dutch, German, and French property owners with holiday homes in Portugal.
